summary: Tested new AI Studio features: POST /api/generate/agent backend endpoint and full 3-step CreateAgent wizard UI, plus Marketplace. All 13 test scenarios passed.

ui_bugs.issue: React Flow canvas area appears visually black/empty in screenshot - nodes count shows correctly (5/5 nós) but nodes may not visually render inside the ReactFlow viewport. Could be a rendering timing issue or ReactFlow container height issue.

action_items: Investigate ReactFlow canvas rendering in Step 2 - nodes may not be visually rendering (canvas shows black). Check if the ReactFlowProvider/FlowCanvas container has a defined height (flex-1 may need explicit min-height).
critical_code_review_comments: CreateAgent Step 2: FlowCanvas is inside flex-1 container but may not render nodes visually due to missing explicit height on parent. The flex-1 div wrapping ReactFlowProvider may need min-h-0 or explicit height to allow ReactFlow to compute its viewport correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (all flows work, minor canvas rendering concern)

context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_6 tests new CreateAgent AI wizard and Marketplace. Backend generate endpoint works perfectly with real LLM (gpt-4o). All 3 steps of CreateAgent wizard work: step1=prompt+examples, step2=flow canvas with node counter, step3=credential wizard with skip/save buttons. Marketplace has search, category filters, install buttons with toast. Only concern: ReactFlow canvas in step 2 may not visually show nodes (canvas appears black in screenshot) - node count badge shows correctly though.
mocked_apis: MCP Marketplace install is frontend state only (no backend)
